metadata.title: Marketplace | Cambio Cromos
metadata.description: Buy, sell and trade stickers with the community. Find your missing stickers and complete your collections.

index.title: Community Collections

tip.title: What are collections?
tip.description: Collections are templates created by the community. Copy one to create your own album and keep track of the stickers you have, need, and your duplicates.

empty.searchDescription: There are no collections matching your search. Try other terms or create a new collection.
empty.quietDescription: There are no community collections yet. Be the first to create one!

reviewForm.availabilityDesc: Once created, the template will be available for you and other users (if public) to use as a base for their collections.
reviewForm.termsDialogText: If you decide to share a public template or list, remember that this information will be visible to other users. Only upload original content or content you have rights to use. By publishing it, you authorize Cambiocromos.com to display it within the platform for informational or community purposes, without acquiring ownership rights over it. You can delete your template whenever you want. By continuing, you accept the Terms of Use and guarantee that the content you share complies with the law and third-party rights.

publishSparesModal.packDescriptionHelp: You can edit the description before publishing. It includes all details for each sticker.
